creator: pfg1+@pitt.edu
text:
Hi,
I know this PR is closed, but it doesn't seem a good idea to reference
a port on the manpage since it isn't installed by default, and some of
us don't install the ports tree. Isn't the BSDI bsd2dos(1) version
available now for commiters ??

cheers,

    Pedro.

ps. Yeah ..I know i
